footerBrand.reason: Owner explicitly rejected old Made by Paradise bot footer in panels and voice controls.
footerBrand.implementation: Footer brand is now config-backed with Made By Fieel default.

staffDirectory.requiredStyle: Grouped directory, not one flat staff list.
staffDirectory.implementation: updateStaffTeamEmbed now renders grouped fields and supports optional staffTeamBannerUrl.

languageSetup.requirement: Setup flow must ask Turkish/English and render starter embeds/panels in selected language where supported.
languageSetup.status: LIVE DISCORD VERIFIED in the test/template laboratory

blacklistAppealVisibility.requirement: Blacklisted members should receive BLACKLISTED role and only see ban appeal information; unblacklist/bail-review are staff-only/review channels.

channelMatrix.ban-appeal / blacklist-appeal: Hidden from everyone; readable by BLACKLISTED members and staff
channelMatrix.bail-review: Staff-only unless a future ticket grants explicit participant access

roleHierarchy.requirement: Clean separator roles and missing admin/hoster roles must exist.
roleHierarchy.implementation: Paradise Clan and Community role arrays now include owner/admin/moderation/hoster/referee/community/ping/language/region/top/stage separators.

leaderboardCards.requirement: Top boards must be cleaner, show full Stage / Level / Strength, and use line GIF separators only where helpful.
leaderboardCards.implementation: Leaderboard cards now render full rank text and attach the owner-provided fixedbulletlines GIF to the first board card.

referencePanelPatterns.staffTeam: Banner/header plus clearly separated Owner Rank, High Rank, Low Rank, Hoster and Referee groups.
referencePanelPatterns.pingRoles: Compact native buttons with grouped event and competitive pings.
referencePanelPatterns.regionRoles: One-click region buttons with clean continent labels.
referencePanelPatterns.faq: Short question/answer sections with linked guide channels and strike-system explanation.
referencePanelPatterns.rules: Original banner, numbered sections, concise enforcement text and escalation route.
referencePanelPatterns.applicationOverview: Original banner, server purpose, requirements, tryout/application explanation and ownership summary.

activeTrainingTryoutMessages.requirement: Active training/tryout announcements must be normal Markdown messages, not embeds.
activeTrainingTryoutMessages.implementation: Smoke and command training/tryout start payloads remain content messages with buttons, not embeds.

chromeVerification.scope: Visible server/category/channel structure and the empty TSBTR Yedek rules channel were checked read-only. The full history of every channel was not audited.

notes: Detailed styling decisions still primarily come from owner screenshots and pasted instructions. The live Chrome check confirms the three current managed-server structures but does not replace a full channel-history audit.
